caption: A man wearing a green t-shirt, a green baseball cap, and black over-ear headphones speaks into a professional black microphone. His shirt features white text that reads "YOU NEEDED THIS SHIT". He is positioned in a room that appears to be a clothing store or studio, with various framed photographs on the wall behind him and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt and green pants to his left. Racks of clothing are visible in the background. Two logos appear as overlays on the screen: a circular black and white logo on the left and a red logo that reads "MODERNLY FIT" on the right. Throughout the sequence, the man continues to talk, with subtle shifts in his facial expression and mouth movements as he speaks, while the camera angle and background remain static.
